purpose: Decouple preview UX from inline processing completion and preserve polling-driven updates.

completed.title: Vehicle photos are stored as remote URLs
Workspace client no longer depends on inline terminal result payloads

remaining.description: Move processing off the request lifecycle into a durable background trigger.
Formalize valid state transitions for pending, processing, complete, failed, and expired.
Cover upload, polling, completion, and cache reuse end to end.

notes: Current repo posture is authenticated single-store, not tenant-scoped.
Preview polling is active and should remain the user-facing completion path.
